subcodes.first_line: O you who have been enraptured by the fragrances of God! … In these days, that Turkish tax-collector — namely, Ibn-i Abhar — has also arrived
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله مکاتیب متعدده شما وارد و مضامین کل مورث روح و ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @humor; jokes
